name_jp: $n = Get-Clipboard; $j = [ + (($n -split `r`n | ? { $_.trim() -ne  } | % { $p = $_ -split `t; $name = $p[0].trim().Replace('', ''); $st = if ($p.Count -gt 1) { $p[1].trim().Replace('', '') } else { 不明 };  { `name_jp`: `$name`, `status`: `$st` } }) -join ,) + ]; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($(Get-Location)/drugs.json, $j, (New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding($false))); git add drugs.json; git commit -m Add 1120 items with status; git push origin main; 【完了】1120件、すべての流し込みに成功しました！
